contexts:
Title: Thai Coconut Curry Soup Recipe
Ingredients: 3 Onion - chopped, 2 cups Coconut milk, 1 teaspoon Sesame seeds (Til seeds), 1 teaspoon Poppy seeds, 3 cups Vegetable stock, 3 sprig Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - chopped, 1 Stalk Lemon Grass - crushed, 4 cloves Garlic - finely chopped, 3 Green Chillies - (Thai variety), 2 Kaffir lime leaves - crushed, Raisins - a few, 2 Bay leaves (tej patta), 1 teaspoon Salt - (adjust to taste), 2 cups Wheat Noodles - or rice noodles boiled, 1 teaspoon Coconut Oil, 1 teaspoon Sugar - (optional), 2 tablespoons Cashew nuts, 1 inch Ginger - finely chopped, 1/2 teaspoon Cumin seeds (Jeera)
Directions: To begin making the Thai Coconut Curry Soup Recipe, heat the coconut oil in a heavy bottomed pan Add in the bay leaves, ginger and garlic to the hot oil and fry on low heat Add in the crushed lemon grass and kaffir lime leaves at this stage and fry it for another minute.Next, add in the green chilies and chopped green onions together with the vegetable stock to the pan Cover the lid and bring all the ingredients to a boil, reducing the flame thereafter and allowing it to simmer for another 20 minutes.Now, add in the coconut milk to the pan to thicken the soup, the ground spice powder and salt and bring all of them to a boil again.Finally, pass the entire pan contents through a sieve to remove the chunkier bits and you will be left with a smooth soup.Put the curry soup back again in the pan and boil this till it reaches a good consistency.At this stage, put in the boiled whole wheat noodles or rice noodles to the soup.Serve Thai Coconut Curry Soup garnished with raisins, accompanied with toasted bread on the side Or pair Thai Coconut Curry Soup Recipe with Spicy Chilli Garlic Noodles Recipe or Thai Basil Vegetarian Fried Rice With Pineapple and Spicy Thai Red Chillies Recipe

Title: Thai Chicken Noodle Soup With Veggies Recipe
Ingredients: 1 tablespoon Lemon juice, 1/2 teaspoon Turmeric powder (Haldi), 1 teaspoon Sriracha sauce, 100 grams Chicken - shredded, Salt - to taste, 3 cups Chicken stock, 100 grams Rice Vermicelli Noodles (Thin) - boiled, 2 Stalks Celery - finely chopped with leaves, 30 grams Baby corn - sliced, 2 cloves Garlic - finely chopped, 5 sprig Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - finely chopped, 1 inch Ginger - thinly sliced, 2 Stalks Lemon Grass - thinly sliced, 1 Red Bell pepper (Capsicum) - sliced in wedges, 1 or 2 Fresh Red chillies - sliced lengthwise, 30 grams Green beans (French Beans) - cut length wise
Directions: To begin making the Thai Chicken Noodle Soup With Veggies recipe, keep the boiled noodles ready to be used Into a saucepan, add the chicken stock,  garlic, ginger, red chillies, celery stalks, lemon grass, sriracha sauce and bring to a boil on medium heay Now add gthe chicken, once the chickenhas been boiling for about 5 to 6 minutes and is partially cooked, add the vegetables - babycorn, beans, bell pepper and mix everything well.When the vegetables and chicken are tender, add the boiled noodles and give it one more brisk boil.Turn off the heat, stir in the chopped coriander leaves, lemon juice and serve Serve the Thai Chicken Noodle Soup With Veggies followed by a meal of  Chinese Fried Rice  and Healthy General Tso's Chicken Recipe for a simple weekday dinner

Title: Thai Style Khao Tom Recipe (Black Rice Clear Soup Recipe)
Ingredients: 1 Onion - sliced, 1 Onion - sliced and caramelised, 2 sprigs Spring Onion Greens - chopped, 1 Fresh Red chillies - slit diagonally, 1 tablespoon Soy sauce, 1 inch Ginger - chopped, 1 teaspoon Lemon juice, 2 cloves Garlic - chopped, Salt and Pepper - to taste, 1 Stalk Lemon Grass - slit diagonally, 4 tablespoons Black Rice, 100 grams Tofu - cubed, 2 Whole Eggs, 2 sprigs Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - chopped
Directions: To begin making the Thai Style Khao Tom Recipe, we will first make the broth, Heat 4 cups of water with black rice, lemon grass, onions, ginger and garlic.Boil it in low heat for 25 minutes This will be your main broth for your soup.In the mean while keep the egg to boil with shell, you can check our recipe on how to boil an egg.Heat a sauce pan with oil and add the onions and sauté them until it is brown and keep it aside.Check if the black rice is cooked in the broth, the rice will little crunchy so do not overcook it The black rice will take about 30 minutes to cook.Add the soy sauce, spring onions, coriander leaves and check for salt.To garnish, add the broth to a serving bowl, place the peeled boiled egg, add caramelized onions, fresh tofu and garnish it with some more coriander leaves and serve.Serve the Thai Style Khao Tom Recipe as a one dish meal for your morning breakfast as a healthy start and accompanied with Thai Grilled Pineapple or a simple Thai Som Tum salad by the side

Title: Thai Pumpkin Soup With Red Curry Paste Recipe
Ingredients: 1 Lemongrass, 2 tablespoons Extra Virgin Olive Oil - extra virgin, 2 tablespoons Thai Red Curry Paste, 1 Thai Red chilli (Birds Eye Chilli) - for garnish, 1 tablespoon Lemon juice, 1 tablespoon Coconut milk - to garnish, Salt - to taste, 3/4 Onion - chopped, 1 tablespoon Cumin seeds (Jeera), 10 Fresh Red chillies - soaked in warm water for 10 minutes, 1/2 teaspoon White pepper powder, 1 inch Ginger - or galangal, 1 cup Coconut milk - thick, 2 cups Vegetable stock, 1 cup Kaddu (Parangikai/ Pumpkin) - diced, Coriander (Dhania) Leaves - for garnishing, 1 teaspoon Black pepper powder, 4 cloves Garlic - roughly chopped
Directions: For the Red Thai Curry Paste:To prepare Thai Pumpkin Soup With Red Curry Paste Recipe, prepare the Red Thai Curry paste recipe Place the ingredients - lemongrass, red chillies, garlic, ginger, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, white pepper powder, salt to taste, lemon juicein a food processor or blender and process well to create a fragrant Thai red curry paste.Use as required or store refrigerated for further use If you find the paste too thick, add a little more coconut milk to help blend ingredients.For the Roasted Pumpkins:Add a little olive oil in a pan and add the chopped pumpkin along with salt, chilli powder and a pinch of turmeric powder Roast them till they are soft Cool and grind to a paste.Heat the remaining Olive oil in a large sauce pan and cook the curry paste for one minute or until it becomes fragrant.Add the vegetable stock along with the pumpkin puree and bring it to a boil Simmer and let it boil for a good 20  minutes on low flame.Add salt and pepper powder along with the coconut milk Stir well and cook for further 5 more minutes.Stir in the lime juice and strain the soup for a smooth texture.Pour Thai Pumpkin Soup With Red Curry Paste Recipe into serving bowls Swirl in some coconut milk and garnish with pepper powder, red chillies and fresh coriander leaves.Serve with Vegetarian Pad Thai Recipe for wholesome and comforting meal

Title: Tom Kha Kaichicken Coconut Soup
Ingredients: 1/2 lb. Chicken Breast meat, Herbs and Spices, 2 Stalks Fresh Lemon Grass, 2 Kaffir Leaves, 2 Whole Shallots, 2 Dried Red Chili Peppers, 2 to 4 Slices 2 Tbsp. Galangal Root (Laos Root), 1/4 c. Scallions 1 inch long, 2 Tbsp. Fish Sauce, 2 Tbsp. Lime Juice, 1 Tbsp. Chili Paste, 2 c. Chicken Broth, 2 c. Coconut Milk, 1/4 c. Cilantro
Directions: Cut up the chicken meat either diced or in strips, chop lemon grass and kaffir leaves in food processor or hand chop finely. Cut the shallots to 1/4 inch strips, cut scallions to 1 inch pieces, chop cilantro with stems, no roots. Peel and slice the galangal root in thin strips 1/2 inch long. Heat pan on medium, add the kaffir, lemon grass, shallots, whole dried chilis, and galangal, stir until light brown. Add the chicken broth and increase the heat to high and bring to a boil. Add chicken, coconut and milk, fish sauce and 1/2 teaspoon chili paste. Add the chili paste in increments and taste before adding the second half. Heat almost to boiling, remove from the heat, add lime juice, cilantro and scallions. Serves 4.
per_question.ground_truth: A Thai soup recipe such as tom yum, tom kha gai, or a Thai curry soup featuring characteristic Thai ingredients such as lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime leaves, or fish sauce.

Title: Chettinad Style Paneer Kurma (Recipe In Hindi)
Ingredients: 1 teaspoon mustard, salt - as per taste, 1 teaspoon poppy poppy seeds, 1/2 cup small onions - cut into four pieces, 1 / 2 cups coconut - grated, 2 green chillies - sliced, oil - to cook, 3 lavang, 250 grams Paneer - Chopped chopped, 1 tablespoon red chili powder, 1 tomato - chopped, 2 Nuggets curry leaves, 1 curry leaves, 2 tablespoons coriander seeds, 2 teaspoons whole pepper, 3 kalpasi leaves, 1 cardamom, 1 inch cinnamon, 2 chakra flowers, 6 dry red chillies, coriander - finely chopped
Directions: To make Pal Katti Chettinad curry, first bake the saree ingredients of Chettinad paste till it turns brown Allow to cool down and grind it well with a blender by adding a little water Now when the oil is heated in a non stick pan, add mustard seeds and asafoetida and cook it Now add garlic and onion and cook till it turns brown Add chopped tomatoes and cook well You can also add salt to cook it quickly Once this curry is cooked, add cottage cheese and mix well Cover it with some water and let it cook for 3-4 minutes After cooking, add finely chopped coriander and mix Serve Pal Katti Chettinad Curry with Tawa Paratha as a meal

Title: Chicken Curry(Recipe From India)
Ingredients: 1/2 c. chopped onion, 1/2 c. chopped celery, 1/4 c. butter, 1/3 c. flour, 2 c. chicken broth, 1 c. tomato juice, 1/2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, salt, pepper, 4 tsp. curry powder, 4 c. diced chicken, 5 c. hot, cooked rice
Directions: Brown onion and celery in butter. Add flour and blend. Add chicken broth; cook until thick, stirring constantly. Add tomato juice, Worcestershire sauce, seasonings and chicken. Heat thoroughly. Serve over the cooked rice. Serves 8.
per_question.ground_truth: An Indian curry recipe featuring a spiced sauce base with ingredients such as cumin, coriander, turmeric, garam masala, and ginger, with a protein or vegetable component.

per_question.question: greek salad or mezze
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "greek salad or mezze".
contexts:
Title: Greek Salad
Ingredients: 1 small head lettuce, 1 small cucumber, sliced, 1 or 2 tomatoes, cut as desired, 1 green pepper, cut into strips, 1 small onion, sliced or 4 scallions, chopped, 2 stalks celery, chopped, 6 radishes, sliced, 1/4 c. parsley, finely cut with scissors, 1/2 c. crumbled Feta cheese, Calamata or Greek black olives, anchovies (optional)
Directions: Break lettuce into small pieces. Place in large bowl with remaining vegetables. Pour enough dressing to lightly coat each piece. Garnish with Feta cheese, olives and anchovies.

Title: Classic Greek salad Recipe
Ingredients: 1 English Cucumber - chopped, 2 sprig Parsley leaves - chopped (optional), 1 cup Iceberg lettuce - washed thoroughly and drained, 2 Tomatoes - cut into chunks, 1 Red onion - sliced, 4 tablespoons Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Salt and Pepper - to taste, 2 sprig Parsley leaves - chopped, 1/2 cup Kalmatta olives, 4 tablespoons Lemon juice, 100 grams Feta Cheese - crumbled
Directions: We begin making the Classic Greek salad Recipe by washing the lettuce thoroughly and draining off any excess water Tear them into bite size pieces and keep it aside.Cut all the vegetables and keep it ready, add all the salad ingredients(lettuce,cucumber, tomatoes,red onion) except feta & olives into a large mixing bowl.In another bowl whisk in the dressing ingredients till it combines Drizzle this on top of the salad mixture and give it a toss.Check for salt and pepper and add if required.Serve the salad on a flat plate topped up with some crumbled feta cheese and olives Serve the Classic Greek salad Recipe as a Party Appetizer followed by a Vegan Moussaka to relish a Greek Meal

Title: Recipe For Greek Salad
Ingredients: 1 head lettuce, washed and cut into bite-sized pieces, 3 tomatoes, washed and cut into bite-sized slices, 1 clove garlic, minced, 3 or 4 green onions, washed, ends cut off and sliced diagonally, 1/2 lb. Greek Feta cheese, crumbled or cut into small pieces, 1 Tbsp. oregano, rubbed between fingers, 1 tsp. Cavenders Greek seasoning, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. ground black pepper, 8 Tbsp. olive oi, 2 1/2 Tbsp. wine vinegar
Directions: Add ingredients in the order given, toss gently and serve with your favorite crackers. I like to serve it with Wheatsworth stone ground wheat crackers. Recipe yields 6 large salads or 10 small salads. Enjoy!

Title: Greek Salad For Two
Ingredients: 1 c. romaine lettuce, 1 c. iceberg lettuce, 1/4 cucumber, sliced, 1/4 green pepper, sliced, 1/4 red onion, sliced, 1/2 stalk celery, chopped, 4 wedges tomato, 2 Tbsp. Feta cheese, 1/2 Tbsp. Parmesan cheese, 2 Tbsp. Italian dressing, black olives (garnish), croutons (garnish)
Directions: In large bowl, mix both lettuces and two cheeses. Place on salad plates and arrange vegetables so they look nice. Pour dressing over and serve with croutons.

Title: Greek Salad Dressing
Ingredients: 3 Tbsp. lemon juice, 3 Tbsp. water, 1 envelope Good Seasons lemon and herbs or Italian salad dressing mix, 2/3 c. olive oil, 3 Tbsp. Feta cheese, crumbled (optional), 1/2 tsp. dried oregano leaves
Directions: Combine lemon juice, water and salad dressing mix in cruet or jar. Shake well. Add olive oil, Feta cheese and oregano. Shake well. Makes 1 cup.
per_question.ground_truth: A Greek recipe such as a traditional Greek salad with feta and olives, hummus, tzatziki, or other mezze dishes featuring Mediterranean ingredients.

per_question.question: chinese stir fry
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "chinese stir fry".
contexts:
Title: Chinese Stir-Fry
Ingredients: 1 pkg. Oriental noodles, 1 pkg. Oriental vegetables, 1 bottle teriyaki marinade, 1 Tbsp. butter, 1 lb. stew meat, seasoning as desired
Directions: In a wok, put butter. Let melt and start to sizzle. Add vegetables and Oriental noodles. Add teriyaki marinade and seasoning. Cover and cook until vegetables are at desired doneness.

Title: Pictsweet Stir-Fry
Ingredients: 1 to 2 Tbsp. oil, chicken, shrimp or beef, soy sauce, 1 pkg. Pictsweet Chinese Stir-Fry, 1 box Rice-A-Roni fried rice, 1 can drained sliced water chestnuts
Directions: Stir-fry meat in oil. Add soy sauce. Add Chinese stir-fry (follow directions on package). Prepare Rice-A-Roni (follow directions on box). Add rice mix to vegetable mix. Add water chestnuts. Add soy sauce as needed.

Title: Chinese Spring Rolls
Ingredients: 1 to 1 1/2 lb. sirloin steak or 4 large chicken breasts, boned, 1/2 tsp. garlic powder, 1/2 tsp. onion powder, 1/4 c. soy sauce, 1 tsp. Chinese 5 spice powder, 2 c. chopped celery, 1 c. shredded cabbage (optional), 1 bunch broccoli (optional), 1 carrot, grated, 3 c. fresh bean sprouts, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, 1 egg, beaten, 1 pkg. spring roll skins (found in produce section)
Directions: Cut meat into small thin pieces. (Tofu may be substituted). In large frying pan or wok, heat 2 tablespoons of oil until smoking. Stir-fry meat, small portion at a time, and set aside. Add more oil if necessary, and stir-fry vegetables until crisp-tender.

Title: Cantonese Style Chicken Chowmein Recipe
Ingredients: 1 tablespoon Oyster sauce, 1 Egg noodles, 1/4 cup Carrot (Gajjar), 1 teaspoon Ginger - crushed, 1/4 cup Red Yellow and Green Bell Peppers (Capsicum), 1 tablespoon Soy sauce, 2 Bok Choy, 1 tablespoon Fish sauce, Spring Onion Greens - for garnish, Salt - as needed, 1-1/2 tablespoon Garlic - crushed, 1 teaspoon Rice Wine Vinegar, 200 grams Boneless chicken, 3 tablespoon Sesame (Gingelly) Oil, 1/2 cup Spring Onion Greens, 1/4 cup Cabbage (Patta Gobi/ Muttaikose), 1 tablespoon Red Chilli sauce, 1 teaspoon Black pepper powder
Directions: To begin making the Cantonese Style Chicken Chowmein recipe, wash and clean the chicken Add pepper powder, little salt, 1 teaspoon garlic and ginger mix well and set aside to marinate for about 30 minutes.To cook the noodles Heat a saucepan with 2 cups of water, a pinch of salt and a few drops of oil, on high heat Once the oil comes to a rolling boil, reduce the flame to medium-high and add the noodles into it Allow it to cook for a couple of minutes, just about about soft, ensuring it does not get over cooked Turn off the flame and drain off the excess water using a colander Hold the colander under running water to cut off the heat and stop the cooking process of the noodles Once the water is completely drained off, transfer the noodles to a bowl, grease your hands with cooking oil and run it through the noodles, to avoid the noodles sticking to each other To toss the noodles Now in a wok/kadai heat 1 tablespoon oil Add marinated chicken pieces and cook until chicken is cooked Remove chicken from the wok and add remaining oil into the same wok.Add 1 tablespoon of minced garlic, and sauté for 10 seconds Add white spring onions and sauté for 30 seconds.Cut all the vegetables into 3 inch strips Add all the cut vegetables into the wok and toss for a minute.Add the sauces and mix well Finally add the cooked noodles and toss well Add salt and pepper powder to taste Toss it well.Finally add some green spring onions on top for garnish and serve immediately.Serve Cantonese Style Chicken Chowmein along with Chicken Manchurian Recipe for a weekend meal, followed by a dessert of Chinese Darsaan Recipe With Ice Cream

Title: Cantonese Style Vegetarian Chowmein Recipes
Ingredients: 2 tablespoons Red Chilli sauce, 1 Green Bell Pepper (Capsicum) - cut into diamonds, 1 packet Egg noodles, Salt - to taste, 1/2 cup Broccoli - cut into florets, 1/2 teaspoon Sesame (Gingelly) Oil, 3 sprig Spring Onion (Bulb & Greens) - finely chopped, 1/4 teaspoon Sugar, 1 tablespoon Vinegar, 1 tablespoon Corn flour, 2 tablespoons Soy sauce, Black pepper powder - for seasoning, 1 1/2 cups Bean Sprouts
Directions: We begin making the Cantonese Style Vegetarian Chow mien Recipe by boiling the noodles in a saucepan with enough water Cook till it is half done Then strain the water by using a strainer and run the noodles under cold water for 1 minute Then toss it with a tablespoon of oil in order to stop the cooking.Pre - heat the “air fryer” at 180-degree celsius for 5 minutes.Once done place the noodles inside the basket and then in order to half crisp the noodle place it inside for 5 minutes When it is done, remove the basket out and keep it aside.Heat a saucepan with oil add ginger, garlic and then add in all the vegetables, fry till the vegetable is all done The next step is to mix the cornstarch in a small bowl with all the sauces and other ingredients mentioned in the list by adding 1/2 cup of water Reduce the heat and pour the entire mixture into the pan slowly and keep mixing slowly so that the sauce doesn't thicken.When the sauce is reached to a pouring consistency, you are now ready to pour it over the half crispy noodles and can be served hot Serve your Cantonese Style Vegetarian Chow Mein with Cantonese Style Ban Mien Bian Ruo (Noodle Soup With Vegetable dumplings)
per_question.ground_truth: A Chinese stir fry recipe cooked over high heat with ingredients such as soy sauce, ginger, garlic, sesame oil, and a combination of vegetables and protein.

per_question.question: french onion soup
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "french onion soup".
contexts:
Title: French Onion Soup With Garlic Toast
Ingredients: 6 to 8 large onions, 4 Tbsp. olive oil, salt and pepper, 2 bouillon cubes (optional)
Directions: Cut onions in half and cut into thin slices. Brown in Dutch oven with olive oil. Fill pot with onions and water. Simmer for 3 hours. Salt and pepper to taste. Add bouillon cubes, if desired.

Title: French Onion Soup - Dannenberg Style
Ingredients: 1 large onion, chopped, 2 green peppers, chopped, 4 c. cold water, small noodles (if desired), 2 beef bouillon cubes, croutons, grated cheese
Directions: Brown onion in frying pan. Then add green peppers to saute. Put mix in quart size pan. Put cold water into pan; heat to boil. (Add small noodles, if desired.) Add 2 beef bouillon cubes or more for flavor. Simmer 5 minutes.

Title: French Onion Soup(Serves 4)
Ingredients: 4 medium onions, 1 Tbsp. butter, 1 qt. beef broth (1 qt. boiling water and 1 bouillon cube), 1/2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/3 c. brandy, 1 c. plain croutons, grated Parmesan cheese
Directions: Thinly slice onions and brown in butter. Add broth, Worcestershire sauce, brandy and a dash of salt and pepper. Simmer until onions are tender. Serve into oven-safe bowls. Sprinkle croutons on top of soup and cover with cheese. Place in oven at 550° until cheese is fully melted and slightly browned. Serve hot.

Title: Parisian Onion Soup
Ingredients: 6 large white onions, 1/2 c. water, 6 tsp. chicken bouillon, dissolved, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/8 tsp. pepper, 6 slices French bread or toast, seasoned croutons, sliced Swiss or Mozzarella cheese, 1/4 c. Parmesan cheese
Directions: Simmer thinly sliced onions in water until tender. Dissolve bouillon. Add to onions. Simmer a few minutes. Place a few croutons and a slice of toast in each bowl. Add a slice of cheese. Pour soup over cheese. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Let stand for a minute or two to melt cheese.

Title: French Onion Soup
Ingredients: 1/4 lb. butter, 2 1/2 lb. onions, sliced, 1 qt. beef stock (3 cans Campbell's beef stock), 1 qt. chicken stock (3 cans Campbell's chicken stock), 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 bay leaf, 1 1/2 tsp. garlic salt, 1 tsp. black pepper (you may wish to use less), salt to taste (you may not want any)
Directions: Heat butter in heavy kettle. Add sliced onions; brown well, stirring constantly. Add beef and chicken stock, the Worcestershire sauce, bay leaf, garlic salt and pepper. Allow to simmer for 40 minutes. Remove the bay leaf; add salt. Prepare with a slice of toasted French bread (1/2-inch thick). Add a thick slice of Swiss cheese (1/4-inch thick), overlapping the bowl. Put under the broiler until cheese is melted and bubbly.
per_question.ground_truth: A recipe for French onion soup — caramelized onions in a rich beef broth topped with a crouton and melted Gruyère or Swiss cheese, baked until golden.

per_question.question: slow cooker beef stew
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "slow cooker beef stew".
contexts:
Title: No Peek Beef Casserole
Ingredients: 2 lb. stew beef, 1 envelope dry onion soup mix, 1 can golden mushroom soup, 1 small can mushrooms, drained, 1/2 c. red wine (optional)
Directions: In crock-pot, put all ingredients except wine. Mix together well. Cover and cook on low heat for 8 to 10 hours. During last hour of cooking, add wine and stir. Serve over egg noodles or rice.

Title: Baked Beef With Gravy
Ingredients: 3 lb. beef stew meat, 1/2 c. water, 1/4 c. ketchup, 1 can each cream of mushroom, celery and onion soup
Directions: Mix all ingredients together and bake in open baking dish at 350° for three hours. Stir occasionally. Serve with rice or noodles.

Title: Stew Beef With Gravy
Ingredients: 2 lb. stew beef, 2 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 tsp. Texas Pete, 2 Tbsp. oil, flour
Directions: Roll stew beef in flour. Heat oil and brown stew beef. When well browned, place in saucepan and add Worcestershire sauce and Texas Pete. Cover with water. Cover and simmer until tender. Delicious served with mashed potatoes or rice.

Title: Beef Burgundy Stew
Ingredients: 2 1/2 lb. boneless beef chuck pot roast, cut into 1-inch pan, 3/4 tsp. dried marjoram leaves, 3/4 tsp. ground pepper, 1 can beef broth, 1 c. Burgundy wine, 2 garlic cloves, crushed, 1 bag baby carrots, 1/2 lb. small mushrooms, sliced, 1 large onion, cut into 1-inch pieces, 3 Tbsp. cornstarch, hot cooked noodles
Directions: Add all ingredients except cornstarch and noodles to crock-pot. Cook on low for 8 hours. In cup, dissolve cornstarch mixture into beef. Bring to a boil. Cook 1 minute or until thickened. Serve over hot noodles.

Title: Crock-Pot Beef Stew
Ingredients: 2 lb. beef chuck or stew meat, cut in 1-inch cubes, 1/4 c. flour, 1 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. pepper, 1 1/2 c. beef broth, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 clove garlic or 1/4 tsp. garlic powder, 1 bay leaf, 1 tsp. paprika, 4 carrots, sliced, 3 potatoes, diced, 2 onions, chopped, 1 stalk celery, sliced, 2 tsp. Kitchen Bouquet (optional)
Directions: Place meat in crock-pot. Mix flour, salt and pepper. Pour over meat. Stir to coat meat with flour. Add remaining ingredients and stir to mix well. Cover and cook on low 10 to 12 hours (best way!) or high 4 to 6 hours. Stir stew thoroughly before serving.
per_question.ground_truth: A beef stew recipe designed for a slow cooker or crock pot, with beef chunks, root vegetables, and broth cooked low and slow for several hours until tender.

per_question.question: grilled chicken marinade
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "grilled chicken marinade".
contexts:
Title: Marinated Grilled Chicken
Ingredients: 2 tsp. lime juice, 1/4 c. pineapple juice, 1/4 c. vinegar, 1 Tbsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1/8 tsp. Tabasco sauce, 1/2 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. garlic salt, 1/2 tsp. paprika, 6 boneless chicken breasts
Directions: Mix all ingredients together. Marinate at least 2 hours. All day works great! Cook on grill, using marinade as baste.

Title: Terrific Grilled Chicken
Ingredients: 1 (24 oz.) bottle Italian salad dressing, 4 to 6 boneless chicken breasts
Directions: Marinate chicken overnight in the refrigerator with Italian dressing in a covered pan. Grill at medium to low heat, until chicken is golden brown and tender, 15 to 25 minutes.

Title: Daddy'S Grilled Chicken
Ingredients: chicken halves, thawed, washed and skinned, McCormick brand Season-All seasoning salt, butter-flavored Pam cooking spray
Directions: The night before, prepare chicken as follows: Spray chicken with Pam. Then coat chicken with seasoning salt completely. Do not add salt or pepper. Place chicken in a large bowl or platter and cover tightly with foil. Chill overnight.

Title: Grilled Chicken Or Turkey Breast
Ingredients: 1 can lemon lime soda, 1 c. soy sauce (lite), 1 Tbsp. horseradish, 1 tsp. garlic powder
Directions: Make marinade of all ingredients.

Title: White Sauce For Chicken
Ingredients: 6 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 1 Tbsp. salt, 1 Tbsp. vinegar, juice of 1 lemon, black pepper, a little sugar (optional)
Directions: Heat almost to a boil. After chicken is almost done on the grill, coat with White Sauce.
per_question.ground_truth: A recipe for marinated chicken intended for grilling on a barbecue or grill pan, with a marinade of oil, acid, and seasonings applied before cooking.

per_question.question: baked salmon recipe
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "baked salmon".
contexts:
Title: Tasty Baked Salmon
Ingredients: 1 lb. can red salmon, 1 c. sour cream, salt and pepper (as desired), buttered bread crumbs
Directions: Heat oven to 450°. Drain and flake salmon and place in a 9-inch baking dish. Pour sour cream all over. Cover with buttered bread crumbs. Bake 30 minutes at 350°. May be served with lemon. Serves 4.

Title: Baked Salmon Patties
Ingredients: 2 cans salmon, 1 c. milk, 2 c. soft bread crumbs, 2 eggs, beaten, salt, pepper, minced onion, parsley, Worcestershire sauce
Directions: Remove skin and partially drain salmon. Combine all ingredients and mix well. Spoon into greased muffin pans, using 1/4 c. mixture in each muffin cup. Bake at 350 degrees until golden brown.

Title: Baked Salmon
Ingredients: 1 fillet of salmon, 1 onion, sliced, 4 to 6 bacon strips, 1 (16 oz.) can whole tomatoes, drained
Directions: Lay fillet of salmon in baking pan; put onion slices over fish and layer bacon strip over onions. Bake at 350° for 30 to 45 minutes. Last 10 minutes, pour whole tomatoes over fish.

Title: Salmon Bake
Ingredients: 1 1/2 lb. salmon steaks, dash of nutmeg, 1 green apple (a bit tart)
Directions: Preheat oven to 400° to 450°. Wash and pat dry salmon steaks. Place on sheet of foil. Cut apple into thick slices and place on top of salmon. Sprinkle with nutmeg (to taste) and wrap foil over. Place in oven (can put cookie sheet under foil or in shallow baking dish). Bake 15 to 25 minutes, covered, then unwrap and continue baking 5 to 10 minutes longer at lowered temperature of 350°, until salmon pulls into flakes with fork.

Title: Jules Salmon Bake
Ingredients: 4 salmon filets, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, Salt and pepper to taste, 1 tsp. dill weed, 1 lemon, sliced, 1/2 c. brown sugar
Directions: Preheat oven to 400°. Brush salmon with olive oil. Sprinkle with salt, pepper and dill. Squeeze lemon on top of salmon and sprinkle with brown sugar.	Top salmon with the lemon slices. Bake 20 to 30 minutes. This bakes really well in stoneware.
per_question.ground_truth: A salmon recipe where the fish is cooked in an oven by baking, with seasonings, herbs, or a glaze applied before or during cooking.

per_question.question: pan fried pork chops
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "pan fried pork chops".
contexts:
Title: Henry'S Pork Chops
Ingredients: 4 or 5 pork chops
Directions: In skillet with margarine, add salt, pepper and chili powder to taste. Cook until brown.

Title: Breaded Pork Chops
Ingredients: 4 to 6 pork chops, salt, pepper, 1 to 2 eggs, flour to dust chops, oil, 1 stick butter, bread crumbs
Directions: Pound chops; salt and pepper both sides. Beat egg(s). Dip pork chops into flour, then egg, then bread crumbs, covering both sides. Fry in hot oil until brown and crispy on both sides. Put chops in roasting pan with water and a pat of butter on top of each pork chop. Cover and bake about 1 hour at 350°. Then uncover and bake for 30 minutes more.

Title: Quick, Tasty Pork Chops
Ingredients: center cut pork chops, salt and pepper, Worcestershire sauce
Directions: Wash center cut pork chops. Rub thoroughly on both sides with salt and pepper to taste; place in foil covered shallow pan. Sprinkle Worcestershire sauce on each side of the chops. Rubbing it in and turning every 5 minutes.

Title: Baked Pork Chops
Ingredients: pork chops, salt and pepper, catsup, brown sugar, 1 lemon, sliced
Directions: Preheat oven to 350°. Remove excess fat from chops and place in baking pan. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Then on each chop, spread catsup about 1/8-inch thick. Sprinkle 1 1/2 to 2 teaspoons brown sugar on each chop, then place a slice of lemon on each chop. Sprinkle a little more brown sugar. Bake for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, depending on the thickness of the chops, basting occasionally.

Title: Barbecued Pork Chops
Ingredients: pork chips (thin), Worcestershire, barbecue sauce, butter
Directions: Top each pork chop with 1 pat of butter, Worcestershire sauce and barbecue sauce. Wrap individually in foil and bake at 350° for about 30 minutes.
per_question.ground_truth: A pork chop recipe cooked by pan frying in a skillet with oil or butter, producing a seared exterior and juicy interior.

per_question.question: steamed vegetables with sauce
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "steamed vegetables with sauce".
contexts:
Title: Stir-Fry Vegetables
Ingredients: vegetables, chicken broth
Directions: Stir-fry veggies in chicken broth, no oil. Light cooking is best. You can season with onion flakes, garlic flakes or no-salt seasoning mix. Serve hot.

Title: Oriental Vegetables
Ingredients: 16 oz. pkg. frozen broccoli, carrots, water chestnuts and red peppers, 1/2 c. water or chicken broth, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, dash of garlic powder, 1 1/2 tsp. cornstarch, 1/8 tsp. ground ginger
Directions: In medium saucepan, cook vegetables as directed on package. Drain. In small saucepan, stir together remaining ingredients. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Cook and stir for 2 minutes more. Pour sauce over vegetables. Toss to coat. Serves 4 to 6.

Title: Sweet And Sour Vegetables Recipe
Ingredients: 3 tablespoons Tomato Ketchup, 1/2 teaspoon Soy sauce, 1 Onion - cut into wedges, 4 sprig Spring Onion Greens - bulbs and leaves, 2 cloves Garlic - grated, 5 Baby corn - cut 1 inch lengthwise or rounds, Salt and Pepper - to taste, 1 Green Bell Pepper (Capsicum) - cut into wedges, 1 teaspoon Vinegar, 1 Carrots (Gajjar) - cut into rounds, 1 tablespoon Corn flour, 1 tablespoons Red Chilli sauce - (adjust to taste), 5 Cauliflower (gobi) - florets
Directions: To begin making the Sweet and Sour Vegetables recipes, do make sure you have all the ingredients ready and the vegetables cut in the desired shapes and sizesMethod to make the sauceCombine all the ingredients in the sauce by adding 1/2 cup of water Whisk well Place the ingredients in a sauce pan and bring the mixture to a boil stirring continuously to lumps don’t form Once the sauce thickens, adjust the thickness of the sauce by adding more or less water Check the salt and spice levels and add more of the sauces if needed Keep this sauce aside, while we proceed to prepare the vegetables.Heat a tablespoon of oil in a wok over a high flame and add the onions, garlic and capsicum and sauté on a medium flame for 1 to 2 minutes.Stir in the remaining vegetables, sprinkle some salt and stir fry until the vegetables are cooked and slightly tender You can optionally cover the wok and cook on medium heat This creates a steam that helps the vegetables in the wok to cook faster.Once the vegetables are done, add in the prepared sauce and bring the mixture to a boil Once the vegetables get well coated with the sauce, do a taste check Adjust salt and spice levels to suit your taste.Serve Sweet And Sour Vegetables Recipe along with Vegetarian Hakka Noodles (Chinese Chow mein Recipe) or Chilli Coriander Fried Rice Recipe for a Friday meal

Title: Steamed Vegetable Platter(Serves 4)
Ingredients: 6 garlic cloves, peeled and minced, 2 tsp. reduced-sodium soy sauce, 2 tsp. freshly squeezed lemon juice, 1/4 tsp. freshly ground black pepper, 3 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 1 1/2 tsp. curry powder, 1 large or 2 small onions, finely sliced, 3 Tbsp. chicken broth or water, 1 head savoy cabbage (about 2 lb.), finely shredded, 1/3 c. toasted peanuts
Directions: In a 12-inch skillet, heat the oil and stir in the curry powder until blended. Add the onions; when it's sizzling, add the broth and cabbage. Cook over medium heat, stirring, until slightly wilted, about 2 minutes. Add more liquid if needed. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, an additional 6 minutes, until tender-crisp. Sprinkle with peanuts and serve.

Title: Glazed Vegetables
Ingredients: 1/2 cup water, 1/2 cup balsamic vinegar, 1 tablespoon butter, salt and pepper to taste, baby packaged fresh carrots, brussel sprouts, broccoli, cauliflower, zucchini, yellow squash
Directions: Place vegetables in a pan with the water and vinegar. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium, and cover. Cook 10 minutes. Remove lid and turn heat up and allow liquid to reduce and glaze the vegetables. Season with salt and pepper. Serve.
per_question.ground_truth: A recipe where vegetables are cooked by steaming and served with a complementary sauce such as butter, soy, or tahini.

per_question.question: roasted root vegetables
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "roasted root vegetables".
contexts:
Title: Roasted Root Vegetable Soup
Ingredients: 3 to 4 c. leftover roasted vegetables*, 4 c. low sodium chicken broth or vegetable broth, 1 tsp. celery seeds, salt and freshly ground pepper, 1/2 c. chopped fresh flat leaf parsley (for garnish)
Directions: Place the vegetables, broth, 2 cups of water and celery seeds in a soup pot and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Cover loosely and reduce heat to simmer until vegetables are very tender, 25 to 30 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside to cool. Transfer the vegetable mixture to a food processor and puree until very smooth. This may have to be done in batches. Return the soup to the pot. Add salt and pepper to taste and cook over medium heat until just heated through. Taste and adjust the seasonings, if necessary. Serve garnished with parsley.

Title: Roasted Vegetables
Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. butter, 2 Tbsp. olive oil, thyme to taste (optional), rosemary to taste (optional), soy sauce or Tabasco to taste, onions, potatoes, use your favorite veggies: turnips, broccoli, cauliflower, garlic, peppers, zucchini, summer squash, mushrooms)
Directions: Preheat oven to 475°. Melt oil and butter in roasting pan large enough so that vegetables rest on bottom of pan. Adjust oil and butter to amount of vegetables. Using tongs, turn cut sides of longest cooking vegetables down to seal in juices (potatoes, onions, turnips). Roast 15 minutes. Toss once or twice. Add medium cooking vegetables (broccoli, summer squash) and pour soy sauce (or other favorite sauce) to coat. Roast 15 minutes. Add mushrooms and any seasonings. Toss lightly. Roast 5 to 10 minutes. Serve with cornbread.

Title: Pan Roasted Herbed Baby Potato Recipe With Vegetables
Ingredients: 1 Carrot (Gajjar) - cut diagonally, 1 tablespoon Dried oregano, 2 tablespoon Red Chilli flakes, Salt - to taste, 1 tablespoon Dried Thyme Leaves, 8 Basil leaves - chopped, Extra Virgin Olive Oil - for cooking, 200 grams Button mushrooms - stem cut, 1 cup Cauliflower (gobi) - cut into medium sized florets, 10 cloves Garlic, 15 Baby Potatoes - cut into half
Directions: To begin making the Herbed Pan Roasted Vegetables Recipe, Keep all the vegetables prepped and ready to roast them.Heat a flat skillet with some olive oil, add in baby potatoes, sprinkle some salt and saute for few seconds Cover it with the lid and leave it for 25 minutes Keep checking at regular interval of time so that the potatoes are evenly roasted.Once the potatoes are done keep the pan separately and let’s move on to roast cauliflower and carrot Heat another flat skillet with oil, add cauliflower and carrot, sprinkle some salt and saute for few minutes.Cover it with the lid and cook for 20 minutes, again keep checking at regular interval of time Once done transfer it to a bowl.Into the same pan, add little more olive oil, add in mushroom and garlic cloves, and sprinkle a little salt Cover it with the lid, roast until the mushroom sweat a little, this will take about 5 minutes to get done.Finally, keep the pan that has the roasted baby potatoes, add in roasted cauliflower, carrot, mushroom and cloves Sprinkle seasonings like red chilli flakes, oregano, thyme, chopped basil leaves and salt and give it a toss.Serve the Herbed Pan Roasted Vegetables Recipe along with French Onion Chicken , Red Wine Sangria Cocktail to make your weekend meal complete

Title: Three Vegetable Roast
Ingredients: butternut squash, potatoes (red or white), acorn squash
Directions: Peel, seed and chunk squash and potatoes. Brush with oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cook at 350° on a greased cookie sheet until tender.

Title: Roasted Cauliflower Recipe

Directions: To begin making the roasted cauliflower, first pre-heat the oven to 200 degree celsius.In a mixing bowl, toss together the olive oil, garlic and cauliflower florets Sprinkle salt as required.Place these florets on a baking tray and roast till they just soften (about 10-12 minutes) Take the tray out of the oven.Add the coriander powder, cumin and black pepper powder.Mix and place it back in the oven to roast for another 10 to 12 minutes or till the cauliflower is cooked and caramelizes or slightly turns brown Take it out onto a serving dish.Garnish with pomegranate seeds, herbs and drizzle some molasses or honey over it Serve immediately.Serve Roasted Cauliflower as a starter or as a side dish along with Panchmel Dal and Phulkas for a weekday lunch or dinner

Title: Beef Tenderloin Stuffed With Lobster(Assemble The Roast Tenderloin Up To A Day Ahead.)
Ingredients: 2 (4 lb.) beef tenderloins, trimmed of fat, salt, pepper, 16 to 18 oz. frozen lobster tail meat, cooked 3 to 5 minutes in water
Directions: Trim off tips of tenderloin to make 11-inch long cylinders. Sear the tenderloins on all sides in a large skillet, one at a time. Butterfly each tenderloin lengthwise by cutting the lower third of the meat of within 1 inch of the opposite side. Lay the tenderloin open; butterfly remaining thick portion, starting from the last cut in the center. Pat meat firmly to make a 9 x 11-inch rectangle about 1/2 inch thick. Season with salt and pepper. Arrange half the lobster pieces in rows lengthwise across the tenderloin. Roll the tenderloin firmly, keeping the lobster pieces centered inside the roll. Tie the meat roll with string at 2 inch intervals. Repeat with second tenderloin and remaining lobster. Refrigerate until 1 hour before serving time. Bake in 350° oven for 1 hour or until the internal temperature of the meat reaches 135° to 140°. Remove strings. Slice and serve with Bearnaise Sauce. Serves 20.

Parmesan Cheese

Title: Breakfast Made Beautiful(Make This The Night Before)
Ingredients: sliced bread, 2 lb. sausage, browned, drained and crumbled, sliced sandwich cheese, 7 or 8 eggs, 3 c. milk, 1 bottle bacon bits
Directions: Grease with oleo a large oblong casserole dish. Trim crust from slices of bread. Butter bread on one side only. Arrange slices, buttered side up, to completely cover bottom of dish. Cover the bread slices with half of the sausage. Lay slices of cheese over sausage. Repeat bread, sausage and cheese. Combine eggs and milk. Pour over casserole. Cover and refrigerator overnight. Next morning, let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes. Sprinkle bacon bits over the top. Bake at 350° for 30 to 45 minutes, depending on your oven.

Title: Breakfast Omelet
Ingredients: 6 to 8 slices bread, 1 lb. bacon, 1/2 tsp. dry mustard, 3/4 c. sharp Cheddar cheese, 8 eggs, 4 c. milk, salt and pepper to taste
Directions: Grease 9 x 13-inch pan. Place bread in pan. Fry bacon crisp and break in small pieces. Mix bacon and rest of ingredients. Pour over bread and cover with foil. Refrigerate overnight. Bake next day in 350° oven for 1 hour.

Title: Saturday Brunch
Ingredients: 1 lb. meat, cooked and drained (sausage, bacon or ham), 1 c. Cheddar cheese, 2 c. milk, 6 eggs, well beaten, 1 tsp. dry mustard, 1 tsp. salt, 1/2 tsp. white pepper, 1 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 6 slices bread, crusts removed and cubed
Directions: Options: Add mushrooms, onions and green peppers.

Title: French Toast Daddy Style
Ingredients: 2 slices of your favorite bread, 1 or 2 slices of cheese, anything you might like in an omelet, 2 eggs, 2 Tbsp butter, Frying pan (Ha Ha)
Directions: 1) Lightly butter each slice of bread.

Title: Skillet Breakfast
Ingredients: potatoes, American or Velveeta cheese slices, ham slices
Directions: In skillet, soft-fry potatoes (as many as you want). When done, remove from grease, drain and place on platter. Cover with slices of American or Velveeta cheese. While potatoes are frying, heat slices of ham in microwave. Put ham on top of cheese. Fry eggs (over easy) and place on top of ham. Serve with toast or biscuits.
per_question.ground_truth: A breakfast or brunch recipe that is more elaborate than everyday breakfast — such as eggs benedict, French toast, a frittata, or pancakes with toppings.

Title: Recipe For Healthy Children
Ingredients: 1 large open field, well grassed and clean, 6 children, boys and girls of assorted sizes, 2 or 3 dogs
Directions: Sprinkle with pebbles and flowers; moisten in running brook water. Cover with blue sky and bake in the sun. When they are done brown, remove children and set to cool in bathtub.

Title: How To Preserve Children
Ingredients: 6 children (assorted sizes), 1 large grassy field, 1 deep blue sky, 1 narrow brook (pebbly, if possible), 3 small dogs, hot sun, flowers
Directions: Mix children with dogs and empty into field, stirring constantly. Sprinkle field with flowers. Pour brook gently over pebbles. Cover all with deep blue sky and bake in hot sun. When children are well browned, they may be removed and placed in bathtubs to cool.

Title: Preserved Children
Ingredients: 1 large field, half a dozen children, 2 or 3 dogs, a pinch of brook, some pebbles
Directions: Mix the children and dogs together. Sprinkle the field with flowers. Spread over all a deep blue sky and bake in sun. When brown, set away to cool in the bathtub.

Title: Recipe For Preserving Children
Ingredients: 1 large grassy field, 2 or 3 dogs, some pebbles, 1/2 doz. children, 1 pinch brook
Directions: Mix the children and dogs together. Put them in a field, stirring constantly. Pour the brook over the pebbles. Sprinkle the field with some flowers. Spread over all a deep blue sky and bake in a hot sun. When brown, remove and set to cool in a bathtub. Now, go on with your cooking.

Title: For Kids Only Play Dough!
Ingredients: 1 c. flour, 1 c. water, 1/2 c. salt, 1 Tbsp. cream of tartar, 1 Tbsp. cooking oil, food coloring
Directions: Combine ingredients. Cook on high, stirring constantly. Let cool and let the kids play. It's edible too!
per_question.ground_truth: A family-friendly dinner recipe with mild flavors and simple presentation that children would typically enjoy — such as pasta, pizza, nuggets, or mac and cheese.

per_question.question: romantic dinner for two
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "romantic  for two".
contexts:
Title: Recipe For A Vital Marriage
Ingredients: Care, Love, Friendship, Passion, Respect
Directions: Blend with much Understanding and lots of Forgiveness. Bake continuously in the oven of Commitment and Trust. Baste often and liberally with a Sense of Humor. Serve with plenty of Communication in a Problem-Solving Atmosphere (especially good when shared with loving Family and Friends).

Title: Happy Marriage Recipe
Ingredients: 3 c. love, 2 c. warmth, 1 c. forgiveness, 1 c. friend, 4 spoons hope, 2 spoons tenderness, 1 pt. faith, 1 barrel laughter
Directions: Combine love and warmth. Mix thoroughly with tenderness. Add forgiveness. Blend with friends and hope. Sprinkle all remaining tenderness. Stir in faith and laughter. Bake with sunshine. Serve daily in generous helpings.

Title: A Happy Marriage
Ingredients: 1 c. consideration, 1 c. courtesy, 2 c. milk of human kindness, 1 gal. faith in God and each other, 2 c. praise, 1 small pinch in-laws, 1 reasonable budget, 3 Tbsp. pure extract (I'm sorry), 1 c. confidence, 1 c. encouragement, 2 children (at least), 1 hobby, 1 c. blindness to each other's faults, dash of cooperation
Directions: Flour with frequent portions of recreation and a dash of happy memories. Stir well and remove jealousy, temper and criticism. Sweeten well with generous portions of love. Keep warm with a steady flame of devotion. Never serve with cold shoulder or sharp tongue.

Title: Marriage Cake
Ingredients: 2 c. understanding, 1 c. sense of humor, 1 tsp. teasing, 2 tsp. spunk, 1 c. patience, 1/2 c. sharing, 2 tempers, separated
Directions: Sift understanding once through his love, once through her love and once through the love of Christ. Add teasing and spunk; sift once more. Separate tempers. Beat his until tender and hers until light and frothy. To his, add patience and sharing; add to understanding to which has been added a sense of humor. Fold in hers with spice of your own choice. This can be varied from time to time, for variety is the spice of life. Handle all ingredients tenderly. Bake in 4 loving arms, well prepared with forgiveness, at a comfortable temperature. Put layers together with hugs and kisses. Slice in generous slices and share often.

Title: Recipe For A Happy Marriage
Ingredients: 1 c. consideration, 2 c. flattery, carefully concealed, 2 c. praise, 1 pinch in-laws, 1 generous dash of cooperation, 1 c. contentment, 2 children (at least), 1 c. blindness to faults of others, 2 c. milk of human kindness, 1 gal. faith in God and each other, 1 reasonable budget, 3 tsp. pure extract of I'm sorry, 1 c. confidence, 1 c. encouragement, 1 c. several hobbies
Directions: Take one child. Mix with generous pats of good humor and understanding. Blend in discipline as needed. Surround with music, love of nature, pets and friends. Bake in a warm, pleasant atmosphere. Use large amounts of patience. Do not be discouraged if at times objects do not seem to be turning out to your perfection. Continue basting. Before you realize it, your delight turns out even better than you had even hoped for. Release when properly aged.
per_question.ground_truth: An elegant dinner recipe suitable for two people — featuring quality ingredients such as steak, seafood, or pasta — presented in a refined and intimate style.

per_question.question: late night snack idea
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "late night snack idea".
contexts:
Title: Late Nite Noodle Special
Ingredients: 1 (1 lb.) macaroni, 1 large can tomato juice, 1 1/2 sticks margarine
Directions: Cook macaroni until tender. Rinse, heat margarine and tomato juice until margarine is melted. Add to noodles. Nice for a late night snack.

Title: After School Snack
Ingredients: Ritz crackers, peanut butter, miniature marshmallows
Directions: Spread peanut butter over crackers, then put marshmallows on them and microwave until marshmallows are melted.

Title: Over Night Sticky Buns
Ingredients: 1 stick of oleo-melted, 3/4 cup brown sugar, packed, 1 tsp cinnamon, 24 small frozen dinner rolls, 1/4-1/2 cup raisins or nuts, 5 Tbsp butterscotch pudding mix, not instant
Directions: Blend first 3 ingredients well. Spray bundt pan with Pam, sprinkle nuts or raisins on bottom of pan. Layer frozen buns on top of nuts or raisins. Sprinkle butterscotch pudding over rolls evenly. Pour oleo mix over rolls. Cover with a paper towel. Let stand at room temperature over night. Cover loosely with aluminum foil and bake at 350° for 30 minutes. Invert immediately on plate. Enjoy!!

Title: Shantell'S Favorite Snack
Ingredients: 1 pkg. sour cream (8 oz.), 1 pkg. onion soup mix, 1 pkg. crackers (any kind)
Directions: Mix the onion soup mix into the sour cream. Stir well. Place on crackers and eat.

Title: Mr. M'S Munchy Mouth Snack
Ingredients: apple slices, peanut butter, marshmallows
Directions: Spread apple slices lightly with a layer of peanut butter. Sprinkle marshmallows on top of the peanut butter. These can be sandwiched together. Finish off this snack with a big glass of milk because they tend to stick to the roof of your mouth.
per_question.ground_truth: A quick and simple snack recipe that can be prepared in a few minutes with minimal cooking — such as toast, nachos, quesadillas, or a simple dip.

per_question.question: picnic food that travels well
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "picnic food that travels well".
contexts:
Title: Trail Bars
Ingredients: 1/4 c. margarine or butter, 3 c. miniature marshmallows, 3 c. puffed cereal (Rice Krispies, Special K, etc.), 3 c. mixed cut up nuts, dried fruit, seeds, etc.
Directions: Spray 13 x 9-inch baking pan with no-stick spray. Measure out cereal. Cut up fruits and nuts and have all measured and ready to add before melting marshmallows. Melt margarine in large saucepan over low heat. Add marshmallows and stir almost continuously until melted and well blended. Remove pot from heat and quickly stir in remaining ingredients, stirring until well coated. Pour into sprayed pan and allow to cool. Cut into bars and wrap each bar in foil, for hiking. These travel and keep well.

Title: Breakfast In The Car
Ingredients: 1 pita pocket, 1 Tbsp. reduced fat cream cheese, 1/2 c. fresh fruit of choice, 1 Tbsp. chopped walnuts
Directions: Stuff pita pocket with cream cheese, fruit and nuts. Place on a paper towel and microwave on High 20 seconds. Pack up and eat on the go. Yields 1 serving.

Title: Party Munchies
Ingredients: 2 boxes Kroger salted oyster crackers, 2 tsp. dill weed, 2 pkg. buttermilk dressing, 2 c. oil, 2 tsp. lemon pepper
Directions: Mix together oil, dill weed, lemon pepper and dressing. Add crackers. Put in large bowl; stir occasionally. Store in airtight container.

Title: My Vegetable Sandwich(Ideal For Picnic)
Ingredients: 1 c. stir-fry vegetables, 1 Tbsp. flour, cornstarch or cream potatoes (your choice), 1/2 c. onion, salt and pepper to taste, 2 slices bread
Directions: Use 1 cup of stir-fry vegetables. Heat until soft, then add flour, cornstarch or leftover cream potatoes (your choice). Add chopped onion to vegetables. Salt and pepper. Serve as open-faced sandwich or closed sandwich using 2 slices of your favorite bread.

Title: Gorp(Trail Mix)
Ingredients: 1 c. raisins, 1 c. peanuts or sunflower seeds, 1 c. dried banana chips, 1 c. M&M's
Directions: Mix together. Place in sealed plastic bag or other airtight container.
per_question.ground_truth: A recipe suitable for outdoor eating — food that can be prepared in advance, stored at room temperature or in a cooler, and eaten without utensils or heating.

per_question.question: quick healthy chicken dinner for weeknight
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "quick healthy chicken  for weeknight".
contexts:
Title: Chicken Breast Stir-Fry
Ingredients: 12 oz. chicken breast fillets (skinned and boneless), 4.5 oz. jar sliced mushrooms, 16 oz. pkg. frozen vegetables (broccoli, cauliflower, carrots combination), 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 4 to 6 servings rice
Directions: Chop chicken breasts into small pieces. Toss with 1 tablespoon soy sauce and set aside to marinate for 2 to 3 minutes. Prepare vegetables and rice according to package directions. Heat wok or large skillet on medium to high setting. When hot, add vegetable oil and chicken pieces. Cook 3 to 5 minutes or until browned. Add drained mushrooms, drained vegetables and soy sauce. Serve over cooked rice.

Title: Stir-Fry Veggies And Chicken
Ingredients: 1 pkg. boneless, skinless chicken, 1 head broccoli, 3 large carrots, 3 large sticks celery, 1 bell pepper, 1 onion, any veggies in fridge (squash, etc.), 2 Tbsp. peanut oil, soy sauce, garlic, Italian seasoning
Directions: Chop chicken and veggies; brown chicken in oil first, then add onion and other veggies. Stir constantly until browned a little. Add soy sauce, garlic and Italian seasoning and a little water. Cover and simmer until you're ready to eat.

Title: Quick And Easy Chicken Stir-Fry
Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. oil, 3 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves, 1 garlic clove, minced, 1 c. each broccoli flowerets, red pepper strips and carrot slices, 1/4 c. green onion, 1/2 c. miracle whip, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger
Directions: Heat oil in skillet over high heat. Cut chicken into strips. Add to skillet with garlic. Stir-fry 3 minutes. Add vegetables. Stir-fry for 3 minutes. Reduce heat to medium. Stir in remaining ingredients. Simmer for 1 minute. Serve over rice. Serves 4.

Title: Quick Chicken Stir-Fry
Ingredients: 2 Tbsp. oil, 3 boneless chicken breasts (skinless), 1 clove garlic, minced, 1 c. broccoli flowerets, 1 c. red pepper strips, 1 c. carrot slices, 1/4 c. green onions, chopped, 1/2 c. Miracle Whip dressing, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1/2 tsp. ground ginger
Directions: Heat oil in skillet over high heat. Cut chicken into strips and add to skillet with garlic. Fry for 3 minutes. Add vegetables and fry for 3 minutes longer. Reduce heat, add Miracle Whip, soy sauce and ginger. Simmer 1 minute. Serve over rice.

Title: 1 Dish Bistro Stir-Fry
Ingredients: 1 envelope Lipton recipe secrets herb with garlic soup mix, 2 c. frozen vegetables, 1 c. water, 1 lb. boneless, skinless chicken breasts, hot cooked rice
Directions: In large skillet, blend soup mix with water. Boil and continue boiling, stirring for 1 minute until thickened. Add chicken. Cut into strips and add partially thawed and drained vegetables (ex. broccoli, cauliflower and carrots). Cook, uncovered, stirring frequently for 5 minutes or until chicken is done. Serve over hot rice.
per_question.ground_truth: A chicken dinner recipe that is both quick to prepare — under 30 minutes — and nutritionally balanced with vegetables or whole grains, suitable for a busy weeknight.

per_question.question: easy vegan breakfast with fruit
per_question.answer: Here are 5 vegan-friendly recipes for "easy  with fruit".
contexts:
Title: Tutti-Frutti Fruit Salad
Ingredients: kiwi, peeled and sliced, fresh strawberries, fresh pineapple or canned, bananas, dates, pitted, raisins or currants, mangos (in season), papaya (in season)
Directions: Wash all fruits. Cut in various shapes and sizes. Amount depends on number serving. Serve with toast and juice for breakfast; lunch with mixed greens and choice of meats/fish. Dinner appetizer or with ice cream for dessert.

Title: Fruit Salad
Ingredients: 2 cans mandarin oranges, 2 cans pineapple chunks, 4 bananas, sliced, strawberries, grapes, 3 oz. pkg. vanilla pudding
Directions: Cook pudding in fruit juices until it boils. Pour over fruit. Eat immediately or refrigerate. Also great with vanilla ice cream.

Title: Fruit Bowl
Ingredients: 1 (3 1/2 oz.) box vanilla instant pudding, 1 can drained chunk pineapple, 1 can drained fruit cocktail, 1 box drained frozen strawberries, 1 can drained peaches, 3 bananas, cut up, 1 Tbsp. Tang instant breakfast drink
Directions: Mix box of pudding, 1 tablespoon of Tang and juice from drained pineapple. Add fruit and refrigerate.

Title: Fruit Salad Dessert
Ingredients: 1 large can fruit cocktail, 1 large can peach slices, cut up, 1 can pineapple chunks, 2 cans cherries, 2 small boxes lemon instant pudding, bananas
Directions: Cut in bananas right before serving. Add dry mix to fruits in their own juices.

Title: Fabulous Fruit Salad
Ingredients: 1 pt. strawberries, 2 to 3 peaches, 1 pineapple, 1 pt. blueberries, 1 pt. raspberries, 2 to 3 kiwi fruits, 1 large box instant vanilla pudding mix
Directions: All fruits must be fresh, not canned or frozen. Prepare and slice all fruit into bite size pieces. Mix instant pudding mix powder (not prepared) with fruit and refrigerate overnight in sealed bowl. Before serving the next day, toss lightly, mixing thoroughly. The juice and pudding mix make a nice fruit pudding.
per_question.ground_truth: A breakfast recipe that is vegan — no animal products — easy to prepare with minimal steps, and incorporates fresh or frozen fruit as a primary ingredient.

per_question.question: gluten-free italian pasta alternative
per_question.answer: Found 5 recipes for "italian pasta alternative". 2 are compatible with your gluten-free profile. The rest have notes — check the details for substitution suggestions.
contexts:
Title: Pasta Con Presto
Ingredients: 2 large cloves garlic, 2 c. tightly packed stemmed Italian parsley, 1/2 oz. fresh basil, 3 oz. grated Parmesan, preferably imported, 1 c. vegetable oil, 1/2 c. pine nuts, 1 tsp. salt
Directions: Chop 2 cloves of garlic in food processor. While processor is still running add fresh Parmesan cheese, Italian parsley, pine nuts, fresh basil, salt and vegetable oil. When mixture is soft and pasty, spoon sauce over freshly cooked hot spaghetti and mix thoroughly. Add grated Parmesan as topping.

Title: Penne All'Arrabbiata(Milano, Italy)
Ingredients: 500 grams penne or spaghetti (1 lb.), 2 Tbsp. olive oil, 1 medium onion, 2 cloves garlic, 1 (14 oz.) can Italian plum tomatoes, 1 tsp. sugar, salt and pepper, 1 small chili pepper or 1 tsp. dried crushed chilies (hot red pepper flakes), 2 Tbsp. chopped parsley
Directions: Heat the oil and gently fry the chopped onion and garlic until softened. Add the chili pepper and fry gently for 1 minute. Add the tomatoes with their juice, sugar, salt and pepper to taste and cook on a high flame, uncovered, for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. When the sauce is reduced and thick, check the season. If you like a smoother sauce, you can pass the sauce through the medium disk of a food mill. I usually just chop up the tomatoes with a fork and leave the sauce a bit chunky. Add the chopped parsley just before serving. Cook the pasta following the directions on the packet very carefully to avoid overcooking.

Title: Pasta Ala Renee
Ingredients: linguine pasta, 2 cans pasta-style tomatoes, 1 bell pepper, 1 red onion, mushrooms, 5 garlic cloves, crushed or chopped, margarine, pepper, Parmesan cheese
Directions: Prepare pasta according to directions. Saute garlic in margarine until soft. Add onion and bell pepper until tender; add mushrooms, tomatoes and pepper to taste. Combine sauce and pasta. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.

Title: Italian Baked Pasta Recipe With Cheese & Bread Crumbs
Ingredients: 1/4 cup Whole Wheat Bread crumbs, Salt - to taste, 15 Whole Black Peppercorns - crushed, 3 Tomatoes - finely chopped, 1 cup Del Monte Farfalle Pasta, 6 cloves Garlic - finely chopped, 1 Onion - finely chopped, 1/4 cup Parsley leaves - finely chopped, 6 Green olives, 1/2 cup Mozzarella cheese - grated, 2 teaspoons Black olives - sliced, 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese - grated, 1 teaspoon Extra Virgin Olive Oil, 10 Cherry tomatoes - halved, 2 teaspoons Butter, 10 Button mushrooms - cut into large slices, 1/4 cup Basil leaves - finely chopped
Directions: To prepare Italian Baked Pasta, bring 2 cups of water to a boil and add the Del Monte farfalle with a pinch of salt.Cook pasta for 7-8 minutes over medium flame, stirring occasionally.Switch off and drain the excess water Set aside.Heat a medium size pan with oil and add the garlic, onion and salt.When they have lightly browned, add the mushrooms and cook covered for 6-7 minutes over low flame Switch off .Pre-heat the oven at 180 degrees Celsius for 10 minutes.Meanwhile, in a large mixing bowl, add the cooked farfalle, mushroom mixture, chopped tomatoes, parsley, basil, green and black olives, cherry tomatoes, pepper, salt and mozzarella cheese Mix all the ingredients well.Grease a baking dish with butter.Transfer the mixed contents to the baking dish.Mix the parmesan cheese and bread crumbs and sprinkle over the pasta, covering it completely.Drop small dollops of butter on top of the cheese and bread crumbs layer.Bake the pasta at 180 degrees Celsius for 20 -25 minutes.Your Italian Baked Pasta Recipe is ready to be served with fresh salads like Carrot Ribbon Salad or Savory Melon Salad or Avocado, Grapefruit and Walnut Salad

Title: Pasta Ala Norcina
Ingredients: 16 oz. mostaccioli pasta, 1 (28 oz.) can Italian tomatoes, drained and crushed with fork, 1/2 lb. Italian sausage, 1/4 c. margarine, 2 Tbsp. white wine, salt and pepper to taste, hot pepper to taste (optional)
Directions: In a frying pan, crumble sausage and brown in margarine. Add wine. When wine evaporates, add tomatoes, salt and pepper. Cook 15 to 20 minutes over medium heat. Cook pasta according to directions. Drain; add sauce and toss.
per_question.ground_truth: An Italian-style pasta dish made with gluten-free pasta or a gluten-free pasta alternative such as zucchini noodles, rice noodles, or chickpea pasta.

per_question.question: slow cooker vegetarian soup for meal prep
per_question.answer: Found 5 recipes for "slow cooker soup for meal prep". 1 are compatible with your vegetarian profile. The rest have notes — check the details for substitution suggestions.
contexts:
Title: Mom'S Vegetable Soup
Ingredients: 6 fresh tomatoes, peeled and chopped (save juice), 3 sliced carrots, precooked 5 minutes in microwave, 2 diced potatoes, 1 can French onion soup, 1 can water, 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 1/2 sticks margarine, salt and pepper to taste
Directions: Add ingredients to a crock-pot and cook all day.

Title: Slow Cooker Vegetable Soup
Ingredients: 1 lb. cubed beef stew meat, 1 (15.25 oz.) can whole kernel corn (undrained), 1 (15 oz.) can green beans, 1 (15 oz.) can carrots with juice, 1 (15 oz.) can sliced potatoes with juice, 1 (28 oz.) can crushed tomatoes, 1 (1.25 oz.) pkg. beef with onion soup mix, salt and pepper to taste
Directions: Set slow cooker to low setting. Add the meat, corn, green beans, carrots, potatoes, tomatoes, soup mix and salt and pepper to taste to the slow cooker and stir together. Cook on low for at least 6 hours. Add water if necessary.

Title: Crock Pot Potato Soup
Ingredients: 1 stick margarine, melted, 2 cans Cream of Chicken soup, 1 can chicken broth, 1 pt. fat free half and half, 1, 32 oz. pkg. hash browns, thawed, 1 c. mild Cheddar cheese, optional, green onions, sauteed, optional
Directions: Mix and heat all thoroughly in slow cooker, on low for 6 hours or on high for 4 hours.

Title: Crock-Pot Clam Chowder
Ingredients: 2 cans Campbell's potato soup, 2 cans Campbell's clam chowder, 1 can minced clams, 1 medium to large onion, 1 pt. half and half
Directions: Saute onion and add rest of the ingredients. Cook in crock-pot on slow for 3 to 4 hours; stir occasionally.

Title: Black Bean Soup(Slow Cooker)
Ingredients: 3 carrots, sliced thin, 2 celery ribs, sliced thin, 1 medium onion, chopped, 4 cloves garlic, minced, 1 (20 oz.) can black beans, 2 cans (14 1/2 oz.) chicken broth, 1 (15 oz.) can chopped tomatoes, 1 1/2 tsp. basil, 1/2 tsp. oregano, 1/2 tsp. cumin, 1/2 tsp. chili powder, 1/2 tsp. Tabasco
Directions: Combine all of the ingredients together in a slow cooker. Cover and cook on low for 9 to 10 hours.
per_question.ground_truth: A vegetarian soup recipe designed for a slow cooker that can be made in a large batch for meal prep — containing no meat and storing well for multiple days.

per_question.question: low carb high protein breakfast
per_question.answer: Here are 5 recipes for "low carb high protein".
contexts:
Title: Low Carb Mashed "Potatoes"
Ingredients: 4 c. cauliflower florets, 1 oz. butter or margarine, 1 oz. fat-free half and half (optional), Pinch salt, Pinch black pepper
Directions: Steam or microwave the cauliflower until soft. Puree in food processor adding the butter and half & half to taste. Season with salt and pepper. This has 5 grams carbohydrates.

Title: Low Carb Cheeseburger Quiche Lunch Snacks
Ingredients: 1 lb. lean hamburger (85% or better), 1 small onion, diced, 4 slices crisp-cooked bacon, chopped, 3 medium eggs, 1/2 c. whole mayonnaise, 1/2 c. half and half or heavy cream, 8 oz. shredded Cheddar, 1/4 tsp. minced garlic, 1/4 tsp. fresh ground black or to taste, salt to taste (careful the bacon has salt)
Directions: Preheat oven to 350°. Brown hamburger in a heavy skillet; add onion. Remove and mix in bowl with bacon pieces, breaking up any larger clumps with a fork or pastry mixer until you have a fine mix. Drain well of any excess grease and press into the bottom of a deep-dish pie pan. Set aside. Combine remaining ingredients in mixer bowl and whip well. Pour mixture over beef "crust" and bake 40 to 45 minutes until top is browned and "set". Cool for 15 to 20 minutes to slice. This can be packaged in Ziploc or plastic containers for meals quickly microwaved over the next 3 to 5 days. (Does not freeze well, though.) Makes 6 servings.

Title: "Diet" Breakfast Tortilla
Ingredients: 1 egg, scrambled dry, 1 flour tortilla, 1 small red potato, 1 Tbsp. onion (optional)
Directions: Microwave potato for 2 minutes and dice. Scramble egg. Spray pan with cooking spray (Pam) and brown onion and diced potato together. Place egg and potato mixture in a warm flour tortilla. Serve with picante sauce. Food exchanges: 1 protein, 1 1/2 breads, 1 fat.

Title: Low Calorie Salad
Ingredients: 8 oz. lite Cool Whip, 12 oz. lite cottage cheese, 1 (20 oz.) can crushed pineapple, drained, 1 can Mandarin oranges, drained, 1 (3 oz.) pkg. sugar-free orange jello, 1/2 pkg. sugar-free instant vanilla pudding
Directions: Mix Cool Whip and cottage cheese. Sprinkle orange jello over it and mix well. Mix pineapple with oranges and add 1/2 box of pudding. Mix with the mixture of Cool Whip and cottage cheese. Refrigerate at least 2 hours or overnight.

Title: Cake For Diabetics
Ingredients: 1 angel food sponge cake, 1 box strawberries (no sugar), 1 box low calorie Cool Whip, 1 box strawberry jello (NutraSweet)
Directions: Put strawberries on top of cake. Mix jello and pour over cake. Refrigerate and let jello set. Serve with prepared low calorie Cool Whip.
per_question.ground_truth: A breakfast recipe that is low in carbohydrates and high in protein — such as eggs, Greek yogurt, or cottage cheese based dishes — with no bread, oats, or sugary ingredients.

per_question.question: spicy mexican vegetarian tacos
per_question.answer: Found 5 recipes for "spicy mexican tacos" but none fully matched your vegetarian profile. Check the details for substitution suggestions.
contexts:
Title: Spicy Quesadillas
Ingredients: 1/2 c. chopped tomatoes, 1/2 c. taco sauce, 2/3 c. sliced green onions, 1 Tbsp. minced jalapenos, 2 c. shredded Monterey Jack cheese, 8 flour tortillas, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice
Directions: In small bowl, combine tomatoes, taco sauce, 3 tablespoons onions, lemon juice and peppers. Combine cheese with remaining onions. For each quesadilla, sprinkle about 1/2 cup cheese mixture over it. Spoon 2 tablespoons sauce over cheese. Top with another tortilla, pressing gently. Fry in skillet in small amount of hot oil until golden and cheese has melted, turning once. Repeat with remaining ingredients. Heat remaining sauce and serve with quesadillas for dipping. Makes 8 to 10 servings.

Title: Mexican Taco Season Mix
Ingredients: 1/4 c. dried minced onion flakes, 4 tsp. cornstarch, 3 Tbsp. salt, 4 Tbsp. chili powder, 3 tsp. cumin, 1 1/2 tsp. oregano, 3 tsp. dried minced garlic, 3 tsp. hot crushed red pepper, 2 tsp. beef bouillon
Directions: Mix all ingredients together; store in an airtight spice container. Two tablespoons equals 1 commercial package. Mix with ground beef for tacos or burritos.

Title: Taco Seasoning Mix
Ingredients: 2 tsp. chili powder, dash oregano, dash onion salt, small amount of salt and pepper, any other spices you like
Directions: Mix all together. It makes the equivalent of one package of taco seasoning.

Title: Mexican Taco Recipe With Spicy Tofu Crumble
Ingredients: 100 grams Cheddar cheese - shredded (optional), 1 Cucumber - finely chopped, 1 tablespoon Extra Virgin Olive Oil, 2 tablespoon Achari Mayo, 1 Tomato - finely chopped, 4 Soft Taco Shells - or hard taco shells, 1 Onion - finely chopped, Salt and Pepper - to taste, 400 grams Tofu - crumbled, 1/2 cup Sweet corn, 1 teaspoon Tabasco Original - Hot Sauce
Directions: To begin making the Mexican Taco Recipe With Spicy Tofu Crumble, first prep all the ingredients and keep them ready.Mix the tomatoes, onion, cucumber and toss it along with salt and pepper and keep aside.Heat olive oil in a pan; add the crumbled tofu, corn and achari mayo along with tabasco sauce and toss them together on high heat until it is well combined.Check the salt to taste and adjust accordingly Toss the onions, tomato and cucumber into the tofu corn crumble and keep aside.To assemble the Mexican Taco Recipe With Spicy Tofu Crumble, warm the soft tacos on a skillet for a fe seconds.Place it on a platter, spoon the achari tofu corn crumble on the tacos and serve immediately.Serve your healthy Mexican Taco Recipe With Spicy Tofu Crumble along with Mexican Vegetarian Bean & Cheese Enchiladas Recipe, Cinnamon Spiced Orange Iced Tea Recipe, followed by a dessert of Mexican Style Capirotada Recipe-Bread Pudding Recipe

Title: Tacos
Ingredients: 1 pkg. shaped taco shells or 1 pkg. soft tortillas, 1 lb. ground beef or turkey, grated Cheddar cheese, chopped olives, chopped tomatoes, shredded cheese, sour cream, hot sauce
